title: Number of Unequal Triplets in Array
titleCn: 数组中不等三元组的数目

testcases.input: nums = [4,4,2,4,3] Output: 3 Explanation: The following triplets meet the conditions: - (0, 2, 4) because 4 != 2 != 3 - (1, 2, 4) because 4 != 2 != 3 - (2, 3, 4) because 2 != 4 != 3 Since there are 3 triplets, we return 3. Note that (2, 0, 4) is not a valid triplet because 2 > 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The following triplets meet the conditions: - (0, 2, 4) because 4 != 2 != 3 - (1, 2, 4) because 4 != 2 != 3 - (2, 3, 4) because 2 != 4 != 3 Since there are 3 triplets, we return 3. Note that (2, 0, 4) is not a valid triplet because 2 > 0.

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,1,1,1] Output: 0 Explanation: No triplets meet the conditions so we return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No triplets meet the conditions so we return 0.
